topics.title: Navigation
topics.content: Use Explore to browse project sources and entities. Labels are primary; technical IRIs remain available in entity details.

topics.title: Entity types
topics.content: Entio describes classes, object properties, datatype properties, annotation properties, individuals, and supported SHACL shapes.

topics.title: Editing
topics.content: Supported edits use typed forms and deterministic Kotlin translators. Editing does not write source files directly.

topics.title: Staging
topics.content: Staged changes are a shared review queue. They remain unapplied until preview, review, approval, and atomic application complete.

topics.title: Proposals
topics.content: A proposal contains the normalized staged set, deterministic validation, and a semantic diff for human review.

topics.title: Reasoning
topics.content: Reasoning reports asserted and inferred facts separately, consistency, unsatisfiable classes, and supported explanations.

topics.title: SHACL
topics.content: SHACL validation reports deterministic findings against an applied or preview graph. Findings must be resolved through the ordinary review workflow.

topics.title: FIBO
topics.content: The curated external ontology browser returns deterministic FIBO modules and descriptors. Reuse preserves original external IRIs.

topics.title: Collaboration
topics.content: Shared staging and proposal events are visible to collaborators.

topics.title: Conflicts
topics.content: A conflict means the proposed operation no longer has a safe current baseline or overlaps another incompatible change. Refresh and review before continuing.

topics.title: Permissions
topics.content: Contributors may browse and prepare their own changes. Reviewer-only actions include reviewing, approving, rejecting, applying, rollback, and semantic-job cancellation.

topics.title: Provider settings
topics.content: Provider credentials stay in server memory and are never returned to the browser. Entio can discover candidate models for the current key; select and test a model before using provider verification. Verification may incur a small provider charge.

topics.title: Errors
topics.content: Entio error codes identify deterministic boundary failures. Resolve the reported scope, input, permission, baseline, or validation condition before retrying.

errorCodes.AI_CREDENTIAL_MISSING: Configure an OpenAI credential before discovering or selecting models.
errorCodes.AI_CREDENTIAL_INVALID: Replace or remove the rejected OpenAI credential. Entio does not retain it in browser storage.
errorCodes.AI_MODEL_NOT_AVAILABLE: Refresh the available models and select an ID returned by Entio.
errorCodes.AI_MODEL_SELECTION_REQUIRED: Select and verify an available model before provider verification.
errorCodes.AI_PROVIDER_RATE_LIMITED: Wait before repeating model discovery or verification.
errorCodes.AI_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT: The provider did not respond in time. Retry discovery or verification later.
errorCodes.AI_PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE: The provider is temporarily unavailable. Non-AI Entio features remain available.
errorCodes.forbidden: The current user does not have the permission required for this action.
errorCodes.invalid-search-query: The local semantic search text is missing or invalid.
errorCodes.missing-credential: Configure and test a provider credential before discovering or verifying models.
errorCodes.missing-entity: The requested entity is not present in the selected project and source scope.
errorCodes.project-load-failed: The registered Entio project could not be loaded or parsed.
errorCodes.proposal-invalid: Deterministic proposal validation found blocking issues.
errorCodes.source-scope-violation: The requested source is outside the current project run scope.
errorCodes.staging-conflict: The staged changes cannot be normalized into one safe proposal.
errorCodes.unknown-project: The requested project is not registered in the web server allowlist.
